name: Eternal Masters

draft.notes: 15-card pack plus an additional ad card. Every pack contains a foil card. Pack: 10 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 1 foil, 1 ad card. In the foil slot, commons appear 5/7 of the time, uncommons 3/14, and rares (or mythic rares) 1/14.

sourceNotes: Masters reprint set. Large set, normal size for its era. Every pack guarantees a foil. Marketing cards have tokens/emblems on front; backs carried Conspiracy: Take the Crown preview messages (Marchesa & Adriana). Printed in USA. 24 packs per box.
